leadOwned.reason: Mutable workflow state, packet publication and operation artifacts belong to the controller.
Controller-owned refreeze support for preserving compatible accepted tasks across plan adoption.
Controller-owned CLI flag for compatible accepted-task preservation during refreeze adoption.
Controller-owned regression coverage for compatible accepted-task preservation during refreeze adoption.
Controller-owned public workflow export for finalization.
Controller-owned next-action projection for FINAL_AUDIT finalization.

requirements.description: Before downstream extraction, fixture, skill, adapter or release work starts, WS-01 shall pass an autonomous local bootstrap boundary: the controller-managed generic repository-policy scan, the complete neutrality negative suite and the foundation suite shall run with Python stdlib only, without pytest, network, host-operation approval or committed origin-specific deny values. Every local validation command shall consume the signed controller operation request, write only declared controller protocol outputs, bind run, package, task, attempt, phase, operation, command, plan digest, source revision and canonical path, and fail closed on any non-zero neutrality counter, output conflict, skipped input, opaque input, read race, incomplete scan, unsupported archive, archive-limit breach or path alias conflict. Origin-specific deny values and Ed25519 signing material shall remain outside the standalone repository and shall be supplied only to downstream pre-launch, post-attempt, release and finalization neutrality gates through the bounded fresh external NEUTRALITY_* authority contract.

The kit shall provide a reproducible Python 3.11 through 3.13 package foundation with one locked dependency graph, Apache-2.0 notices, stable versioning, clean-environment installation metadata, and a single canonical implementation source; cross-platform release proof is governed separately by REQ-PLATFORM-MATRIX.

task.launchGate: LG-01 frozen plan verified and controller-validation receipt authority supplied by the controller runtime
